title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Lodha Group Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Real Estate Agent to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha Group Digital Technologies:
Lodha Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
